title: GetSession
description: Action: `get_session`. Fetches a snapshot of an existing session by ID. The server replies with an `immediate_response` event whose `data` contains the session details. Useful for reconnects — the client can restore its local state without creating a new session.

Request.title: GetSessionRequest
Request.description: Fields sent by the client to retrieve a session.

requestId.description: Client-generated correlation ID echoed back on all related events.

sessionId.description: ID of the session to retrieve.

Response.title: GetSessionResponse
Response.description: Data payload carried in the `immediate_response` event. Field set matches `Session` in `domain/session.schema.json` (wire-subset; full domain object may include additional server-only fields).

userParticipantId.description: Participant ID for the user in this session.

agentParticipantId.description: Participant ID for the agent in this session.

threadId.description: smooth-operator thread identifier. Present when the session has an associated workflow thread.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the session.
